translations.ConfigSets define the schema and configu: ConfigSets define the schema and configuration for your SOLR collections. They contain field definitions, analyzers, and other search settings.

translations.Configure basic connection settings for: Configure basic connection settings for your SOLR server including authentication and network options. Use the separate ConfigSet and Collection Management dialogs to manage cores and collections.
translations.Configure how database objects are conve: Configure how database objects are converted into vector embeddings for semantic search. Objects are directly vectorized without needing text extraction.

translations.Configure parameters for file vectorizat: Configure parameters for file vectorization. This process will generate vector embeddings for all extracted file chunks.

translations.Configure which types of data to search: Configure which types of data to search and how many sources to retrieve

translations.They will be retained according to their: They will be retained according to their schema's configured retention period and then permanently removed.
translations.This action cannot be undone. Make sure: This action cannot be undone. Make sure no collections are using this configset.

translations.This will permanently delete ALL embeddi:
This will permanently delete ALL embeddings (vectors) from the database. You will need to re-vectorize all objects and files. This action cannot be undone.

Are you sure you want to continue?
translations.This will permanently remove {count} alr: This will permanently remove {count} already soft-deleted objects from the database. This action cannot be undone.
translations.Tip: only enable views that need semanti: Tip: only enable views that need semantic search to minimize embedding costs. Simple lookup tables rarely need vectorization.

translations.When disabled, this facet will only show: When disabled, this facet will only show values from this schema and will include a schema filter when selected.
translations.When enabled, saving this object will al: When enabled, saving this object will also update the target objects to include a reference back to this object.
translations.When enabled, this property will be remo: When enabled, this property will be removed from the source object after updating the target objects.
